ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures number */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company profile */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_profiles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price the stock was purchased at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that triggered the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price predicted by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
